description: Add a UK visa application schema extraction and dynamic form-generation workflow to VIZA, modeled on the existing DS-160 approach. The run should identify the official UK visa application journey, capture required fields plus all enumerated options and conditional branches, normalize that into VIZA's visa_form_fields / schema flow, and expose a renderable UK visa form path with truthful documentation of any unsupported source-flow gaps.

scopeContract.truthStatement: This run is about official-source-first UK visa form parity: complete field coverage, accurate options, and preserved branching logic are more important than broad but speculative support.
scopeContract.rejectedAssumption: A hand-written UK form or a partially copied field list is NOT acceptable proof of parity. The implementation must be grounded in the official UK application flow and document any gaps explicitly.
scopeContract.designPrinciple: source-truth-over-manual-approximation: preserve the official field structure, requiredness, options, and conditional logic in a machine-readable VIZA schema before optimizing downstream automation.
scopeContract.integrationNotes: Reuse the existing DS-160/dynamic-form patterns where appropriate. Do not hardcode brittle one-off UI-only fields when the underlying schema path can be extended. Do not claim unsupported UK visa categories beyond the canonical v1 journey selected during implementation.
